mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (board_id, member_id, content) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, m.nickname AS member_nickname FROM comment c JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.id WHERE c.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY c.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE board_id = #{boardId}

SELECT c.*, m.nickname AS member_nickname, b.title AS board_title FROM comment c JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.id JOIN board b ON c.board_id = b.id WHERE c.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT c.*, m.nickname AS member_nickname FROM comment c JOIN member m ON c.member_id = m.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
